case_title: JOSE DELCID VS. ADIR INTERNATIONAL LLC

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL LLC
ORDER RE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO IMPROPER VENUE.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ADIR INTERNATIONAL, LLC (HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-2022 AT 1:30PM)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY DELCID, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AUTHORIZES THE CLERK TO SIGN THE STIPULATION FOR THE JUDGE PRO TEM ON HIS BEHALF. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT IS ADDRESSED WITH PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIES TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL LLC DBA CURACAO IS LOCATED IN LOS ANGELES AND THAT PAYMENTS MADE TO DEFENDANT WERE MADE IN LOS ANGELES. COURT DETERMINES THAT LOS ANGELES IS THE CORRECT VENUE FOR THIS CLAIM TO BE HEARD IN. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JOSE DELCID IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCES. COURT ALLOWS PLAINTIFF'S APPEARANCE BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL LLC IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125) SERVED JAN-12-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ADIR INTERNATIONAL LLC
